---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for IRIS
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A brief description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Syntax / API

If applicable, show what the feature would look like in IRIS code:

```iris
// Example usage of the proposed feature
def main() -> i64 {
    // ...
    0
}
```

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches? If so, describe them.

## Additional Context

Any other relevant information, references to other languages, papers, etc.
